note: Mirror of pptx/chart-series and docx/chart-series. At Add time, series pass as dotted props on the parent chart (series1.name, series1.values, series1.color, series1.categories). This schema represents per-series Set/Get after creation. Combo charts (mixed chartType per series, or secondary axis) are not supported. Create a separate chart for each chart type. lineWidth (line width in pt) and lineDash (solid/dash/dot/dashDot/longDash) are available on line/scatter series; `lineStyle` is not a recognized key (rejected as UNSUPPORTED — use lineWidth/lineDash instead).

name.description: series name shown in legend and data labels.

values.description: comma-separated numbers, OR cell range reference.

categories.description: per-series category override; range reference only.

smooth.description: smooth line interpolation for line/scatter series.

marker.description: per-series marker symbol. Values: circle, dash, diamond, dot, picture, plus, square, star, triangle, x, none. Supports 'symbol:size:COLOR' compound form (e.g. 'circle:8:FF0000'). Applies to line/scatter/radar series.

markerSize.description: marker size in points (2–72). Applies when marker is not 'none'.

lineDash.description: series line dash style. Set accepts user-friendly aliases (dash/dot/dashDot/longDash); Get returns OOXML token (sysDash/sysDot/sysDashDot/lgDash). 'solid' is the only round-trip-stable value.

dataLabels.separator.description: per-series data label separator string readback.

dataLabels.numFmt.description: per-series data label number format readback.

invertIfNeg.description: invert color for negative values (per-series readback).

errBars.description: error bar value type token (e.g. cust, fixedVal, stdDev).
